ocr_findings.description: SDGs row in table: image shows a styled badge 'SDGs' (with superscript エスディージーズ above) as the term cell. OCR renders this as two separate lines 'エステイジーズ' on one line and 'SDGs' on the next, creating a split row header. The katakana reading is also wrong: image shows 'エスディージーズ' (furigana) but OCR outputs 'エステイジーズ' — wrong_char in the reading.
Furigana/reading for SDGs: image shows 'エスディージーズ' but OCR produces 'エステイジーズ' — 'ディ' misread as 'テイ', changing the katakana reading of the acronym.

reviewer_notes: CSR-related terms table page. Main prose and three of four table rows (グリーンIT, ダイバーシティ, ソーシャルビジネス) are accurately captured. The SDGs row has a katakana misread in the furigana ('エスディージーズ' → 'エステイジーズ') and a split-row formatting issue. The supplementary 'もう少し詳しく！' box text is accurately reproduced.
